summary: Comprehensive testing of ThreadlyCo Design Studio iteration 2 focusing on NEW image capture features. Backend 100% functional including new base64 image storage. Frontend core features working but AI design generation failing in live environment, preventing full testing of new image capture flow.

integration_issues.issue: AI design generation not completing in frontend despite backend API working
integration_issues.symptoms: Button shows 'Generating...' state but no designs appear after 45+ seconds
integration_issues.frontend_status: Loading state detected but no designs rendered
integration_issues.impact: Prevents testing of NEW image capture features

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate)
All 13 backend endpoints including NEW image capture feature
Login page loads and authentication flow works
Dashboard loads with updated stats (40 generated, 5 approved)
Navigation to Design Generator page works
Settings page loads with all configuration sections
Printify API key and Shop ID fields present and functional
Product pricing configuration for all 8 product types
Discounts & pricing settings (25% markup, TEST20 promo code)
NEW FEATURE: Backend product approval with design_image_base64 field
NEW FEATURE: Backend stores base64 PNG data correctly
NEW FEATURE: Backend Printify push endpoint handles image upload flow

success_percentage.backend: 100% (13/13 API endpoints passing including NEW features)
success_percentage.frontend: 80% (8/10 core features working - AI generation blocking new features)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI design generation in frontend - backend API works but frontend not receiving/displaying generated designs. This blocks testing of the NEW image capture features (html2canvas, base64 storage, Printify upload flow). Check frontend error handling, API response processing, and timeout settings.
